title: Grilled Teff Ethiopian Stir-fry
description: An earthy and velvety comfort dish featuring stout in a sugar-free-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 2 cups collard greens, roughly chopped (or spinach)

instructions: Combine teff flour and water in a large bowl until smooth. Add salt and mix well.
In a separate pan over medium-high heat, heat olive oil then sauté onion and garlic for about 3 minutes.
Add bell pepper and cook for an additional minute. Incorporate collard greens and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until tender.
Gradually add teff mixture to the vegetables in the pan, stirring constantly to prevent lumps and achieving a creamy texture.
Spoon onto serving plates and place on a grill grate over medium heat. Cook until golden brown and crispy on top (about 5 minutes).
